pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 8, failing to leverage Java 11 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 11-only libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 11 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using @Generated or other annotations will fail to compile without this dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler options with the unified release option.
pom.xml.why_exists: While source/target still work, the release flag is the standard for Java 9+ to ensure module path compatibility and correct class file versioning.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.
Replace the verbose Optional filter-and-map pattern with the more concise flatMap(stream) idiom introduced in Java 9.
Replace negated Optional.isPresent() checks with Optional.isEmpty() for cleaner code.

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the negated isPresent() check with the isEmpty() method introduced in Java 9 for Optional.
